```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| label: lollipop
//| class: musicchart
// https://observablehq.com/@mcmire/tone-map
{
  const points = origs.map((orig, i) => ({
    origin: orig,
    x: orig,
    ratio: Fraction(1, 1),
    label: labels[i],
    color: colors[i],
    freq: hertz[i],
    alwaysShowLabel: true
  }));
  return renderGraph(points, {
    // axisTextColor: window.darkmode ? "#FFF" : "#000",
    xAxis: {
      ticks: origs.map(Math.round)
    },
  });
}
```
